privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new, purely synthetic workflow rule in SuiteCRM. The expected workflow name ('Auto-Qualify High-Value Prospects'), target module ('Opportunities'), status ('Active'), condition amount ('50000'), and condition sales stage ('Prospecting') are fully verified against the explicit instructions provided in the task description and the evaluation logic embedded in export_result.sh.
